key_points: Sven Olsen worked as a skilled construction worker in a space station
Because of the absence of gravity, objects and people floated inside the station
Sven secretly brought a canary named Claribel to observe how birds behave in zero gravity
Claribel became a favorite pet among the crew members
Her sudden collapse revealed a dangerous problem in the station’s air system
examples: The narrator first noticed Claribel when he heard a musical whistle near his ear
Claribel easily floated and even performed loops in the weightless environment
The crew placed Claribel inside an oxygen mask to help her recover
The narrator remembered that canaries were once used in coal mines to detect poisonous gases
Claribel’s collapse helped the crew realize that the air purifier had stopped working properly
formulas_or_processes: Setting → Life and work in a space station
Curiosity → Sven brings Claribel to observe bird behavior in space
Warning → Claribel collapses due to unsafe air
Investigation → Crew checks the station’s air system
Discovery → Malfunction in the air purifier and alarm system
exam_tips: Understand the setting of the story in a space station and the role of zero gravity
Remember that Claribel’s collapse acts as a warning signal for the crew
Link the story to the real-life use of canaries in coal mines
Focus on the theme that careful observation can help prevent disasters
